message:
fix(explain): include custom packs in keyword pre-filter for explain/test --explain

The handle_explain() function was building its keyword index and pack list
from built-in packs only, omitting custom packs from custom_paths. This
caused the Aho-Corasick keyword pre-filter to quick-reject commands that
should have matched custom pack patterns.

Now mirrors the exact custom pack loading logic from test_command():
- Load external packs via expand_custom_paths()
- Merge external pack IDs into enabled_packs
- Merge external keywords into enabled_keywords
- Disable keyword index when external packs are present
- Use load_default_allowlists() for parity with test path

Fixes #82

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
